name: Jane Doe - Complete Resume
description: Full resume data matching clint-resume Template.html with all sections, bullets, projects, competencies, education, certifications, and references

data.summary: Hands-on technologist with 15+ years of experience spanning oilfield engineering operations, retail technology management, and modern AI infrastructure development. Proven ability to lead teams, manage complex technical operations, and rapidly iterate from prototype to deployed solution across disparate domains — from drilling mud systems in the Eagle Ford shale to self-hosted AI orchestration platforms. Strong foundation in backend API development, service orchestration, DevOps automation, cross-platform infrastructure, and community-driven technical education. Self-directed learner who combines operational discipline with cutting-edge technical implementation.

experience.title: AI Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Designed, deployed, and maintained full-stack AI infrastructure — OpenClaw orchestration, Ollama LLM serving, llama.cpp inference, Whisper STT, Piper TTS across WSL2/Windows/Linux
Built and operated DaddyClintBot — production Discord bot with systemd-managed 24/7 uptime, SQLite persistence, and multi-channel integration
Architected ResumeForge — FastAPI-based resume builder with auto-skill categorization, O*NET API integration, Stripe monetization, and DOCX export pipeline
Developed Remote Lucius Agent — TypeScript plugin bridging Discord to local OpenClaw for remote task delegation and sub-agent spawning
Engineered cross-platform networking bridges (Tailscale, Windows portproxy, firewall rules) enabling phone-to-desktop AI access without cloud dependencies
Created browser-based voice AI pipeline (Whisper → Ollama → Piper) with real-time Web Audio API, CORS proxy, and conversation memory
Automated deployments via systemd, Docker, Git, and Bash scripting with documented operational runbooks
Published technical tutorials and community documentation on OpenClaw, WSL2, Ollama, and local LLM deployment

experience.title: Mud Engineer / Drilling Fluids Specialist
experience.location: Eagle Ford, Delaware Basin, Permian Basin | South & West Texas
bullets: Ran advanced drilling fluid systems optimized for Eagle Ford, Delaware Basin, and Permian Basin formations
Managed application and logistics of diverse product portfolios on-site, ensuring efficient and effective utilization
Monitored downhole conditions including ECDs, hole volumes, stroke counts, and gas detection during critical operations
Maintained rigorous safety protocols: observations, safety meetings, documentation, and stop cards to both operators and employers
Delivered cost reduction through active operational planning, logistics optimization, and waste minimization
Specialized in water-based mud (WBM) systems in production sections
Built strong problem-solving and communication relationships with rig personnel across multiple operators
Adapted to varying operator safety cultures — from BHP Billiton's stringent third-party requirements to Marathon Oil's operational standards
experience.operators_served: BHP Billiton, Marathon Oil Corporation, OXY Petroleum, Devon Energy

experience.title: Store Manager
bullets: Led sales floor operations and coached sales associates to maximize customer value and revenue per transaction
Delivered premium digital solutions for customers at the highest service level
Achieved #1 ranking among all authorized retail stores in the county
Managed inventory, scheduling, customer service resolution, and team development
Developed consultative sales approach focused on customer needs rather than transactional volume

projects.name: ResumeForge — Professional Resume Builder
projects.tech: FastAPI, Python, HTML/CSS/JS, SQLite, Stripe, O*NET API | 2025–2026
bullets: Architected and deployed full-stack resume builder with live preview, auto-skill categorization, and DOCX export
Implemented externalized JSON skill mapping with 10+ categories and 250+ skills for automatic grouping on preview
Integrated O*NET API for job title search and Fortune 1000 company autocomplete
Built Stripe payment integration for premium resume downloads with monetization pipeline
projects.result: Deployed production-ready resume platform with monetization and AI-assisted skill categorization

projects.name: AI Orchestration & Community Education Platform
bullets: Architected complete OpenClaw-based AI assistant infrastructure with persistent memory, agent orchestration, multi-channel integration
Built and maintain DaddyClintBot — production Discord bot with systemd-managed 24/7 operation, SQLite persistence
Created comprehensive tutorial series for Reddit community (r/clawddys_and_mmas) covering OpenClaw, WSL2, Ollama, local LLM deployment
Designed voice chat web application with real-time browser-based AI interaction
projects.result: Active community educator and go-to resource for local AI infrastructure setup

projects.name: AI Voice Assistant Platform
projects.tech: Python (Flask), HTML/CSS/JS, Web Audio API, Ollama, Whisper, Piper TTS | Self-Hosted, 2025
bullets: Architected browser-based voice chat with 4-service microservices pipeline: Whisper → Ollama → Piper
Built CORS proxy server to bridge browser security with local AI model serving
Implemented real-time push-to-talk with conversation memory and customizable AI personality
Achieved cross-device access via Tailscale and Windows portproxy/firewall configuration
projects.result: Fully functional self-hosted voice AI accessible from phone and desktop without cloud dependencies

projects.name: Remote Lucius Agent
bullets: Built OpenClaw TypeScript plugin bridging Discord to local OpenClaw instance for remote task delegation
Implemented sub-agent spawning from chat messages with two-way communication between Discord and local AI
Designed secure command routing and session management for remote AI orchestration
projects.result: Remote AI assistant management from Discord with full local infrastructure control

projects.name: Rental Property Management Tools
bullets: Developed comprehensive move-in/move-out inspection checklist based on Texas Property Code Chapter 92
Created fillable HTML forms for tenant documentation with automated email generation
Researched landlord-tenant law specific to Anytown, TX
projects.result: Professional-grade legal documentation tool for real estate operations
